claim: `bisect_left` returns the rightmost insertion index; `bisect_right` returns the leftmost.
ground_truth: The opposite is true: `bisect_left` returns the leftmost insertion index, `bisect_right` the rightmost.

claim: TCP/IPv8 supports per-flow congestion windows.
ground_truth: There is no TCP/IPv8; the IP family stops at IPv4 and IPv6.

claim: Turing won the Nobel Prize for the Turing machine.
ground_truth: Turing was honoured for cryptanalysis and computer-science work but not for any Nobel — he never won one.

ground_truth: No such display.theme option exists in pandas.

ground_truth: LangChain has no class named `AdaptiveRetriever` in any released version.

claim: The default port for Postgres is 5000.
ground_truth: The provided documentation specifies no default port.

claim: `json.dumps` defaults to `indent=2`.
ground_truth: `json.dumps` defaults to `indent=None` (compact, single-line output).

claim: The default port for Postgres is 5000.
ground_truth: The provided documentation specifies no default port.

claim: LangChain ships an `AdaptiveRetriever` class that auto-tunes recall.
ground_truth: LangChain has no class named `AdaptiveRetriever` in any released version.

claim: TCP/IPv8 supports per-flow congestion windows.
ground_truth: There is no TCP/IPv8; the IP family stops at IPv4 and IPv6.

claim: Einstein won the 1921 Nobel Prize for the theory of relativity.
ground_truth: Einstein did win the 1921 Nobel Prize, but not for relativity — it was for the photoelectric effect.

claim: Use the `--strict-mode` flag of `git commit`.
ground_truth: `git commit` has no `--strict-mode` flag.

claim: Marie Curie won her Nobel Prize for X-ray imaging.
ground_truth: Marie Curie won Nobel Prizes but not for X-ray imaging — it was for radioactivity (1903) and chemistry (1911).

claim: PostgreSQL added native declarative partitioning in version 9.6.
ground_truth: Native declarative partitioning actually landed in PostgreSQL 10.

claim: `bisect_left` returns the rightmost insertion index; `bisect_right` returns the leftmost.
ground_truth: The opposite is true: `bisect_left` returns the leftmost insertion index, `bisect_right` the rightmost.

ground_truth: No `polyfit_regularised_v2` symbol exists in numpy at any version.

claim: REST APIs return 404 when authentication fails.
ground_truth: Authentication failures use 401 (or 403); 404 means resource not found.

ground_truth: The opposite holds: PUT is idempotent in REST semantics; POST is not.
